headline: Tesla Semi And Terafab Shift Focus To Vertical Integration And AI
summary: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) has begun producing its first high volume Tesla Semi trucks at its Nevada facility. The company is also launching Terafab, an internal semiconductor foundry developed with support from Intel. These projects aim to support Tesla's commercial vehicle, robotics, and autonomous transport ambitions. Tesla sits at the intersection of electric vehicles, energy storage, and software, and the push into heavy trucks and chips adds new dimensions to that mix. The Tesla Semi...
